name: ZKH Group Limited
summary: ZKH Group Limited operates as a procurement service platform focused on industrial supply chain products in China, connecting suppliers and customers through its online platform and offline service centers. The company offers a range of MRO (maintenance, repair, and operations) products, including consumables, spare parts, and general-purpose products, along with related services like inventory management and delivery solutions. ZKH Group is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
